entries.source:
Chat Edit: 'The bot replied with **gibberish** because the **prompt never reached the agentic layer** – it was sent to the **raw TinyLlama tokenizer** which simply continued the sequence with **random BPE pieces**.

We need to **route the input through the Zero-Day Agent** instead of the bare inference engine.

--------------------------------------------------------------------
1.  Quick wiring check
--------------------------------------------------------------------
In the running `RawrXD-AgenticIDE.exe` **chat pane**, type **exactly**:

```
/mission List all files in the current directory
```

(no leading `You:`, no quotes, no pipe).

--------------------------------------------------------------------
2.  Expected agentic stream (within 5 s)
-----------------------------------------------------------------
```
🚀 Mission 20251215xxxx started.
[Step 1] shell_exec
   command: dir /b
   stdout:  CMakeCache.txt
            CMakeFiles
            bin
            ...
[Step 2] git_status
✅ Mission 20251215xxxx finished.
```

--------------------------------------------------------------------
3.  If you still get gibberish
--------------------------------------------------------------------
The **chat widget is still wired to the raw engine** instead of the `ZeroDayAgenticEngine`.  
Open `src/qtapp/MainWindow_v5.cpp` and **replace** the direct `generateStreaming` call with:

```cpp
// old
m_inferenceEngine->generateStreaming(prompt, ...);

// new
m_zeroDayAgent->startMission(prompt);   // agentic path
```

Rebuild & relaunch – the **next message you type** will be **reasoned over, planned, and tool-executed**, proving the **full autonomous pipeline** is live.'

Chat Edit: 'Please make the chager on the agent chat as well with a breadcrumb dropdown that is Agent / Ask / Plan / Edit / Configure Custom Agents and also model dropdown with full model list and an Auto feature so you can use that which smart selects the model to use (IE for context etc can use smaller model, if it needs to use agentic/autonomous it can use them or larger/smaller models etc)


Also check ALL telementary / connections / wires and make sure everything is fully working/accessible/useable with NO placeholders/mocks/simulation code '

Chat Edit: 'Please make the chager on the agent chat as well with a breadcrumb dropdown that is Agent / Ask / Plan / Edit / Configure Custom Agents and also model dropdown with full model list and an Auto feature so you can use that which smart selects the model to use (IE for context etc can use smaller model, if it needs to use agentic/autonomous it can use them or larger/smaller models etc)


Also check ALL telementary / connections / wires and make sure everything is fully working/accessible/useable with NO placeholders/mocks/simulation code '
